data.description:
## What

Add intent-based navigation so each audience (human client, LLM client, human
contributor, LLM contributor) reaches the right doc fast, plus a compact
symptom→recovery troubleshooting table for the most common failure modes.

## Scope
- Add a short "Choose your path" router near the top of `docs/README.md` routing by
  intent, e.g. "Start using rebar", "Drive rebar over MCP", "Contribute a code
  change", "Understand the internals".
- Add a compact troubleshooting table mapping common symptoms to specific fixes, e.g.
  "claim/transition exits 10" → optimistic-concurrency, pick another ticket;
  "`rebar-mcp` missing" → install the `[mcp]` extra; "`unknown key … ignored`" →
  stale global build, use the repo venv. Keep it small; expand on demand.

Keep the router and table concise — this is a routing aid, not a second manual.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/README.md` opens with a short intent router covering the four audiences.
- [ ] A troubleshooting table maps at least the three symptoms above to concrete
      recovery steps with links.
- [ ] Every router/table link resolves (passes the docs-index / link CI gate).

Files: `docs/README.md`.
data.title: P2: Add intent-based router + symptom->fix troubleshooting table to docs index
